title: Tata Motors Q3 Concall - Margin Commentary
text: Management discussed near-term margin pressure due to commodity costs, export demand softness, and forex volatility.

title: M&M Annual Filing - Debt and Capex
text: Filing highlighted controlled leverage, disciplined capex deployment, and robust farm equipment demand outlook.

title: SEBI Circular - Enhanced Disclosure Norms
text: Updated disclosure requirements emphasize clearer risk-factor and governance communication for listed entities.

title: Infosys Management Commentary - Demand Signals
text: Commentary suggested slower discretionary tech spending in key geographies with cautious near-term guidance.

title: HDFC Bank Quarterly Update
text: Analysts noted stable asset quality trends and gradual NIM normalization amid a mixed credit environment.
